entries.quote: We are sharpening Regalia Gold for the mass-premium salaried customer; rewards must be sustainable, not a giveaway.
entries.signal: HDFC is deliberately reining in loyalty economics to protect margins while doubling down on the premium salaried segment.
entries.belief: [Inferred · High] Management believes premium-segment growth can be sustained by tightening reward leakage rather than by expanding card benefits.
